---
title: "splitstree"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-title: Document Contents
number-selections: true
embed-resources: true
---

##Load packages

```{r}
library(vcfR)
library(adegenet)
library(StAMPP)
```

##Read in vcf

```{r}
#read in vcf
v.outgroup<-read.vcfR("~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/vcfs/filtered.miat.snps.vcf.gz")
```

##Generate splitstree

```{r}
#convert to genlight
gen<-vcfR2genlight(v.outgroup)
#shorten names
gen@ind.names<-gsub("D_","",gen@ind.names)
#assign populations (a StaMPP requirement)
gen@pop<-as.factor(gen@ind.names)
#generate pairwise divergence matrix
sample.div <- stamppNeisD(gen, pop = FALSE)
#export for splitstree
stamppPhylip(distance.mat=sample.div, file="~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/splitstree/dicaeum.miat.100.splits.txt")
```
